entities.name: Post-Workout Protein Shake
entities.context: 30-40g protein shake taken within 30 min of finishing workout for muscle protein synthesis

entities.name: Creatine
entities.context: 5g mixed into post-workout shake, spares methyl groups for MTHFR support

entities.name: GLP-1
entities.context: Medication in use that increases sarcopenia risk, making post-workout protein critical

entities.name: Sarcopenia
entities.context: Muscle loss risk during GLP-1 use that post-workout protein helps prevent

entities.name: MTHFR
entities.context: Genetic variant supported by creatine's methyl group sparing effect

entities.name: Muscle Protein Synthesis
entities.context: Biological process targeted in the 30-min post-workout window
